previous_round.note: Round 1 was pre-RBA PowerPoint data. Round 2 validates the re-analysis after incorporating AWS cost data.

key_findings: URGENT: Azure DMS classic retires March 15, 2026 — use Managed Instance Link instead
Azure VPN Gateway VpnGw2AZ ~$357.70/month vs AWS VPN $149.60/month (net +$208/month)
Sitecore 10.4 Azure App Service PaaS deployment confirmed compatible
Re-add CI/CD migration risk (16h) and search migration risk (12h) dropped in re-analysis
Non-AZ VPN Gateway SKUs deprecated September 2026 — use VpnGw2AZ
recommendations: Add CI/CD migration risk: TeamCity → Azure Pipelines, 30 build configs, 16h impact
Add search migration risk: 30+ custom indexes, path decision needed, 12h impact
Update large_db_migration_window mitigation: DMS → MI Link
Verify Solr version: discovery says 8.8, should be 8.11.2 for Sitecore 10.4
Update backup_dr discovery: RDS automated backups, not SQL native to S3
Specify VpnGw2AZ in networking plan, factor ~$358/month into Azure cost projection
